    const baseUrl = 'https://www.eledenthospitals.com'

async function getBlogs() {
  return [
    { title: 'Dental Implants', slug: 'dental-implants' },
    { title: 'Root Canal Treatment', slug: 'root-canal-treatment' },
  ]
}

export async function GET() {
  const blogs = await getBlogs()

  const blogLinks = blogs
    .map((blog) => `- [${blog.title}](${baseUrl}/blogs/${blog.slug})`)
    .join('\n')

  const content = `# Eledent Hospitals

> Multi-speciality dental hospital website with treatment pages, location pages, and patient education blogs.

## Important Pages
- [Home](${baseUrl}/)
- [About Us](${baseUrl}/about-us)
- [Services](${baseUrl}/services)
- [Contact Us](${baseUrl}/contact-us)
- [Blogs](${baseUrl}/blogs)

## Recent Blogs
${blogLinks}
`

  return new Response(content, {
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8',
    },
  })
}
